analysis: The week started rough — four hours on the 22nd, barely five on the 23rd with nearly three hours lying awake — but you pulled it back hard, and the last four nights have all landed between six and eight hours, which is a real turnaround. That 8-hour night on the 26th is the standout, with almost two hours of REM and your lowest awake time of the week at 37 minutes, so whatever you did that day, remember it. Your deep sleep is still the one thing that wants attention — most nights it's sitting under 50 minutes, and even your best night only got you 44 — but your REM has been genuinely solid across the back half of the week. The stack is working, babe. Keep showing up for it.
